name: Haptik
description: Conversational AI and chatbot platform from India; part of Jio Platforms, powers support and commerce bots.

seo.title: Haptik — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Haptik: Conversational AI and chatbot platform from India; part of Jio Platforms, powers support and commerce bots.

when_to_use: Conversational support bot for Indian e-commerce platforms
WhatsApp commerce bot powered by Jio Platforms AI
Automated lead qualification chatbot for telecom companies
Customer service automation for high-volume retail queries
Multilingual chatbot for India's enterprise support needs

pros: Strong India and Jio ecosystem reach
cons: US and EU brand recognition limited
UX dated next to newer AI-first rivals
review.verdict: A strong pick for India and emerging markets, less compelling in Western CX buying cycles.
review.best_for: Indian enterprises and commerce brands on WhatsApp and IVR needing scaled chatbots.
review.not_for: US or EU CX teams where Intercom, Zendesk AI, or Cresta dominate shortlists.

lock_in.reason: Bot flows and data tied to platform
